mapper.select: SELECT a.approval_id, a.title, a.content, a.start_date, a.end_date, a.applicant_id, app.name AS applicant_name, t.type_name, s.status_name FROM approval a JOIN employee app ON a.applicant_id = app.emp_id JOIN approval_type t ON a.type_id = t.type_id JOIN approval_status s ON a.status_id = s.status_id WHERE a.applicant_id = #{applicantId} ORDER BY a.approval_id desc

SELECT a.approval_id, a.title, a.content, a.start_date, a.end_date, a.applicant_id, app.name AS applicant_name, t.type_name, s.status_name, d.name as department_name, p.name as position_name FROM approval a JOIN employee app ON a.applicant_id = app.emp_id JOIN approval_type t ON a.type_id = t.type_id JOIN approval_status s ON a.status_id = s.status_id LEFT JOIN department d ON app.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN position p ON p.position_id = app.position_id WHERE a.applicant_id = #{applicantId} AND s.status_id = 1 ORDER BY a.approval_id desc

SELECT a.approval_id, a.title, a.content, a.start_date, a.end_date, a.applicant_id, app.name AS applicant_name, t.type_name, s.status_name, d.name as department_name, p.name as position_name FROM approval a JOIN employee app ON a.applicant_id = app.emp_id JOIN approval_type t ON a.type_id = t.type_id JOIN approval_status s ON a.status_id = s.status_id LEFT JOIN department d ON app.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN position p ON p.position_id=app.position_id WHERE a.applicant_id = #{applicantId} AND s.status_id IN (2, 3) ORDER BY a.approval_id desc

SELECT a.approval_id, a.title, a.content, a.start_date, a.end_date, a.applicant_id, app.name AS applicant_name, d.name as department_name, p.name as position_name, t.type_name, s1.status_name, s2.status_name as approver_status_name FROM approver v JOIN approval a ON v.approval_id = a.approval_id JOIN employee app ON a.applicant_id = app.emp_id JOIN approval_type t ON a.type_id = t.type_id JOIN approval_status s1 ON a.status_id = s1.status_id JOIN approval_status s2 ON v.approver_status_id = s2.status_id LEFT JOIN department d ON app.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN position p ON p.position_id=app.position_id WHERE v.approver_id = #{approverId} ORDER BY a.approval_id desc

SELECT a.approval_id, a.title, a.content, a.start_date, a.end_date, a.applicant_id, app.name AS applicant_name, t.type_name, s.status_name FROM approval a JOIN employee app ON a.applicant_id = app.emp_id JOIN approval_type t ON a.type_id = t.type_id JOIN approval_status s ON a.status_id = s.status_id WHERE a.status_id = #{statusId} ORDER BY a.approval_id desc

SELECT a.approval_id, a.title, a.content, a.start_date, a.end_date, a.applicant_id, app.name AS applicant_name, t.type_name, s1.status_name, d1.name as department_name, p1.name as position_name, d2.name as approver_department_name, p2.name as approver_position_name, v.approver_id, apr.name AS approver_name, v.approver_status_id, s2.status_name AS approver_status_name FROM approval a JOIN employee app ON a.applicant_id = app.emp_id JOIN approval_type t ON a.type_id = t.type_id JOIN approver v ON a.approval_id = v.approval_id JOIN employee apr ON v.approver_id = apr.emp_id LEFT JOIN department d1 ON app.department_id = d1.department_id LEFT JOIN department d2 ON apr.department_id = d2.department_id LEFT JOIN position p1 ON app.position_id=p1.position_id LEFT JOIN position p2 ON apr.position_id=p2.position_id JOIN approval_status s1 ON a.status_id = s1.status_id JOIN approval_status s2 ON v.approver_status_id = s2.status_id WHERE a.approval_id = #{approvalId} ORDER BY CASE WHEN p2.position_id = 4 THEN 1 WHEN p2.position_id = 2 THEN 2 WHEN p2.position_id = 5 THEN 3 WHEN p2.position_id = 1 THEN 4 WHEN p2.position_id = 3 THEN 5 WHEN p2.position_id = 6 THEN 6 ELSE 7 END;

SELECT e.emp_id, e.name, e.img_url, d.name as department_name, p.name as position_name FROM employee e LEFT JOIN department d on e.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN position p on e.position_id = p.position_id WHERE e.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{empName}, '%') ORDER BY CASE WHEN p.position_id = 4 THEN 1 WHEN p.position_id = 2 THEN 2 WHEN p.position_id = 5 THEN 3 WHEN p.position_id = 1 THEN 4 WHEN p.position_id = 3 THEN 5 WHEN p.position_id = 6 THEN 6 ELSE 7 END;

SELECT e.emp_id, e.name, d.name AS department_name, p.name AS position_name FROM employee e LEFT JOIN department d ON e.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN position p ON e.position_id = p.position_id WHERE p.position_id IN (5,1,3,6) GROUP BY e.department_id, e.emp_id, e.name, d.name, p.name ORDER BY d.department_id, CASE WHEN p.position_id = 6 THEN 1 WHEN p.position_id = 3 THEN 2 WHEN p.position_id = 1 THEN 3 WHEN p.position_id = 5 THEN 4 ELSE 5 END;
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO approval(type_id, start_date, end_date, title, content, applicant_id) VALUES (#{typeId}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{title}, #{content}, #{applicantId})

INSERT INTO calendar (title, content, start_date, end_date, applicant_id, approval_id) SELECT title, content, start_date, end_date, applicant_id, approval_id FROM approval WHERE approval_id = #{approvalId}
